name: FortiGate Admin Login Disable
description: Detects events indicating that an administrator login has been disabled on a FortiGate firewall. This could be a sign of malicious activity or misconfiguration.

prompts.prompt: A FortiGate administrator login has been disabled. This could indicate malicious activity or a critical misconfiguration. Event Details: **Timestamp** {timestamp}, **User Disabled** {user}, **Source IP** {srcip}, **Log ID** {log_id}, **Virtual Domain (VDOM)** {vdom}. Investigate this high-priority event immediately to confirm legitimacy and restore proper access control.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the event when the admin login was disabled.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The username of the administrator account that was disabled.

parameters.name: srcip
parameters.description: The source IP address from where the disable action originated.

parameters.name: log_id
parameters.description: The FortiGate log ID for the event (e.g., 32021).

parameters.name: vdom
parameters.description: The Virtual Domain (VDOM) on which the event occurred.
